name: Macadamia Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the eggs, sugar, and corn syrup in a bowl; mix well.
2. Stir in the macadamia nuts, butter, and vanilla until combined.
3. Pour the filling into the prepared pastry shell.
4. Bake at 325 degrees for 55 minutes or until the filling is set.
Makes: One 9-inch pie.
